scripts.docker:test: docker run --rm -e HEADLESS=true playwright-ts-framework npm run test
scripts.docker:test:login: docker run --rm playwright-ts-framework npx playwright test tests/login.test.ts --project=chrome
scripts.docker:test:lt: docker run --rm -e LT_USERNAME -e LT_ACCESS_KEY playwright-ts-framework npm run test:lt
scripts.docker:test:artifacts: docker run --rm -e HEADLESS=true -v "$PWD/playwright-report:/app/playwright-report" -v "$PWD/test-results:/app/test-results" -v "$PWD/jsonReports:/app/jsonReports" playwright-ts-framework npm run test
scripts.docker:test:login:artifacts: npm run docker:build && docker run --rm -e HEADLESS=true -v "$PWD/playwright-report:/app/playwright-report" -v "$PWD/test-results:/app/test-results" -v "$PWD/jsonReports:/app/jsonReports" playwright-ts-framework npx playwright test tests/login.test.ts --project=chrome
scripts.docker:test:lt:artifacts: docker run --rm -e HEADLESS=true -e LT_USERNAME -e LT_ACCESS_KEY -v "$PWD/playwright-report:/app/playwright-report" -v "$PWD/test-results:/app/test-results" -v "$PWD/jsonReports:/app/jsonReports" playwright-ts-framework npm run test:lt
